tasks.dependencies: Fetches the Warehouse entity list (stores/zones/segments/vendors) to fan out over
One mapped instance per entity, bound to a dedicated Airflow pool
Runs in parallel with process_unit, watches shared pool capacity
Fan-in of all mapped instances plus the monitor

operator_config.sql: SELECT 1 AS autorca_probe, 'RTL_WHS_QUEUE' AS dag_id, 'load_target' AS task_name;

tasks.dependencies: Evaluates whether queue congestion impacted this or sibling DAGs

incident.description: Queue Congestion incident on the Warehouse pipeline (RTL_WHS_QUEUE): marketing campaign-content-generation queue congestion.
incident.symptoms: A content-personalization task mapped per audience segment (600 segments) caused queue wait times to reach 90 minutes.
incident.root_cause: The task was mistakenly assigned to the same pool as time-critical real-time bidding DAGs, and its high mapped-instance count starved those latency-sensitive DAGs of executor slots during a scheduled 9am campaign launch.
incident.business_impact: Real-time bidding campaign adjustments for a live campaign were delayed, resulting in a measurable overspend against the daily budget cap before adjustments took effect.
incident.resolution: Move content-personalization to its own pool, separate from real-time bidding DAGs; add pool-priority weighting so latency-sensitive DAGs preempt batch-style work.

expected_rca.expected_rca_summary: AI AutoRCA should identify: The task was mistakenly assigned to the same pool as time-critical real-time bidding DAGs, and its high mapped-instance count starved those latency-sensitive DAGs of executor slots during a scheduled 9am campaign launch.
expected_rca.evidence_required: Airflow task logs, Datadog infrastructure/application metrics, JIRA/Confluence RAG context for known-issue matching
expected_rca.airflow_logs: Airflow Pools view shows content_personalization DAG's mapped instances occupying the shared pool disproportionately
expected_rca.datadog_metrics: Datadog shows real_time_bidding pool open_slots dropped to near-zero despite RTB DAGs themselves not increasing in volume
expected_rca.resolution: Move content-personalization to its own pool, separate from real-time bidding DAGs; add pool-priority weighting so latency-sensitive DAGs preempt batch-style work.
expected_rca.preventive_action: Classify DAGs by latency-sensitivity (real-time / near-real-time / batch) in the metadata model and auto-assign pools accordingly during DAG factory generation.
